title: olearia albida var. angulata
intro: Olearia albida var. angulata, commonly known as a flowering shrub native to Australia, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Olearia albida var. angulata include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, Olearia albida var. angulata is often made into tea, infusions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
